name: asana-workflow
description: End-to-end Asana-driven development workflow: from ticket to shipped PR with automated task tracking, git management, and team communication

interface.shortDescription: Run Asana-driven development workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: End-to-end workflow skills for turning Asana tasks into branches, implementation work, QA, PRs, and shipped status updates.
defaultPrompt: Start work from this Asana task URL.
Ship the current Asana workflow task.
Log this discovered work in Asana.
